action.reasoning: Observation: v18 reached promising 63 safe_steps/streak=63, detector=112, min_d=1.12 in ep0 (best yet) but crashed on depth indexing bug (left_mask (256,85) vs depth (256,256) in boolean indexing; w//3=85 for 256px). Config confirms thresholds (500 steps, [1,2)m, success_angle=0.2618rad/15deg). Earlier versions ~50-100 safe. Analysis: depth slice caused shape mismatch on valid_mask; follow mode reaches human but loses persistence vs random oracle (speed match 0.28 + err term drifts). Root cause fixed by slicing depth first then valid. Policy can be tuned for longer streaks (lower speed-match 0.25 when aligned, stronger facing -8*angle, detector>0.1 trigger, OA only on low detector). Decision: rewrite COMPLETE non-truncated test_full_episode.py + predict.py with v19 (fixed robust depth left/right/center using sliced arrays before valid, tuned gains: follow linear=0.25 base +0.15*err clipped, pure-rotate >0.35rad, OA sensitivity reduced, backup <0.9, seek 0.85, alignment-reduced vel, manual per-step safe count using exact angle+dist, full per-epi diagnostics printed, make_serializable, metrics fallback, abs paths+dataset.data_path). Update train.py to v19. Run test_full_episode.py (5 eps) for validation of higher safe/streak before submit_eval on predict.py.
